text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're halfway through summer camp, and
Winning Ticket is devoting herself to training
every single day.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
All right! I gotta work hard so I can get everyone
fired up at my next race!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The plan for today is to run together with another
racer.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Guwaaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: Yaaahhh!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text: Wow, they sure can run!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Hey, look—that's Winning Ticket! Keep up the
great work, both of you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It seems Ticket has gathered more spectators
than one would expect to see at practice.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thanks for the support, everyone!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Heh heh! I didn't think we'd get this much
attention all the way out here at camp!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I wonder if these people watched the Derby and
had a blast cheering us on there too...

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Just imagining it gets me really fired up! I'm
burning hot!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I might've reached my dream of racing in the
Derby, but I'm not stopping there!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta run more and more races that inspire
people!
choice_data_list: Then let's keep practicing with all our might!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Yeah! Our Twinkle Series is just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, let's go hard today and do some super
tough drills!
choice_data_list: Okay, then how about a hundred beach sprints?
Okay, then how about long-distance swimming?

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Whoooaa! A hundred beach sprints? That's
craaaaazy!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But when you say it with that much passion, I can
tell you're not kidding! I can't back down from
this!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: YEAAAAAH! Let's gooooo! GO, ME!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Pumping herself up, Winning Ticket sets off
toward the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Ticket's summer camp continues at full
blast.

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Long-distance swimming?! That sounds like...
SUPER scary!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
But you've got a point—if I can pull it off, I feel
like I won't be turning over just one new leaf—it'll
be a whole tree!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: All RIIIGHT! I'm gonna swim full steam ahead!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: This'll take real guts !

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Splash!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, Ticket's summer camp continues at full
blast.
